message:
fix(a11y): wrap 5 kagent card components in DynamicCardErrorBoundary (#6216 part 2) (#6248)

Follow-up to #6237 (part 1, which wrapped PodSweeper, ClusterComparison,
FluentdStatus, GPUNamespaceAllocations, ResourceUsage). #6216 listed 10
total cards needing ErrorBoundary; this PR completes the remaining 5
kagent cards using the same rename + wrap pattern.

Wrapped:
  - KagentTopology.tsx (234 lines, SVG topology renderer)
  - KagentAgentDiscovery.tsx (188 lines, paginated agent search)
  - KagentModelProviders.tsx (203 lines, model provider grid)
  - KagentAgentFleet.tsx (198 lines, paginated agent fleet table)
  - KagentToolRegistry.tsx (224 lines, paginated tool registry)

Each file: rename inner function to <Name>Internal, add a thin
<Name>(props) wrapper that returns <DynamicCardErrorBoundary> around
the internal. Same pattern EventStream and #6237 use, ~6 LOC per file.

Verified: `npm run build` clean.

Closes #6216.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
